issuerType: Decentralized RWA credit marketplace / protocol operator
legalStructure: CPOOL is documented as the native utility and governance token of the Clearpool protocol. It is used for governance, delegated staking with Clearpool Oracles, borrower staking requirements, and liquidity-provider rewards. It is not documented as a fund share, note, pool token, or redeemable claim on a specific real-world asset reserve.
targetInvestors: Crypto market participants, protocol users, borrowers meeting Clearpool staking requirements, liquidity providers, and governance participants subject to app restrictions and jurisdictional limitations.

classification.classificationNote: CPOOL is Clearpool's native utility and governance token. It should be graded under the governance/protocol profile, not as an asset-backed RWA claim token.

_meta.notes: Added under classification-first SOP as governance_protocol, not asset_backed.
